title: Break and continue should not be used outside a loop
description: Break and continue statements should not be used outside a loop as they can lead to unexpected program behavior.
message: Break or continue statement found outside a loop
recommendation: Place break and continue statements within appropriate loops
why_is_this_an_issue: Break and continue statements can lead to unexpected program behavior when used outside a loop.
how_to_fix: Ensure break and continue statements are used within appropriate loops.
